art_direction: Fantasy idle RPG with modern, slightly stylized 3D-rendered 2D look. Rich colors, clear silhouettes, readable at small sizes. Consistent style across all assets.

vector_fallback.description: SVG icons for UI, simple unit representations, map markers
vector_fallback.use_case: UI elements, fallback when 3D assets not loaded, low-end devices

specs.style: Consistent fantasy 3D render, soft lighting, transparent background
specs.prompt_template: 3D render of fantasy {unit_type}, {faction} style, {rarity} quality, transparent background, game asset, isometric view, soft lighting, detailed --ar 1:1 --v 6

png_3d_rendered.use_case: Unit portraits, battle sprites, item icons, boss images

environment.description: Background images for battle fields, map nodes, UI screens

specs.style: Fantasy landscape, atmospheric, painterly but not photorealistic

effects.description: Battle effects, UI animations, particle sprites

asset_pipeline.generation: AI tools generate base assets from detailed prompts
asset_pipeline.cleanup: Manual or semi-automated background removal, color correction
asset_pipeline.optimization: Convert to WebP, generate multiple resolutions, lazy loading
asset_pipeline.versioning: Assets in Git LFS, versioned with game releases
asset_pipeline.cdn: Upload to Supabase Storage / Cloudflare R2, served via CDN

consistency_strategy.style_guide: docs/design/STYLE_GUIDE.md - Color palette, proportions, lighting rules
consistency_strategy.reference_board: Mood board with 20-30 reference images for consistent style
consistency_strategy.batch_generation: Generate assets in batches with same seed/style parameters
consistency_strategy.review_process: Visual review against style guide before acceptance

placeholder_strategy.mvp: Colored rectangles with unit class icons (Font Awesome / custom SVG)
